rows.label: tev023401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Pollen about the
infrastructure of NLA.

rows.label: tev023401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Pollen about recent developments.

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Pollen about the
infrastructure of NLA.

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Pollen about her
experiences with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Pollen about the citizens of NLA.

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0001
rows.name:
For those of us in the restaurant business, the nearest
and dearest piece of infrastructure is the integrated
production plant in the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0002
rows.name:
All of the Earth-style foodstuffs
distributed throughout NLA are made there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Until the plant was up and running, all we had to
eat were the emergency rations that had been loaded
onto the Whale. ...It was a bad time for morale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But when the plant was finally
put into service, the foods we
lived for went back on the menu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm talking pancakes, hamburgers,
and pizza! All the comfort foods
that our American souls yearn for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0010
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmm? Oh, sorry. I was just praying and
I kind of... spaced out for a minute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I work at the restaurant just
over there. We get a lot of BLADEs
like yourself as customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Including lots of regulars who
do nothing but vent at me about
their work problems all day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Aw, but I don't mind.
They're all such cute kids.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Anyway, I was saying a prayer
for all of my kids who were
called to duty outside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0016
rows.name:
A prayer that they make it back
safely so I can fill their bellies
with my hamburger special once more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0022
rows.name:
I was curious how the integrated production
plant makes all of the Earth foods we eat,
so I went down there for a tour.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0023
rows.name:
I couldn't believe it! For example,
you know that zesian fleawort grass
that grows wild everywhere on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Well they just shovel that into some strange
machine, and it comes out the other side as
bread and meat and whatever else they want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0025
rows.name: I can't begin to imagine how that works.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0026
rows.name:
They said something about the machine
rearranging compositional elements, but
at that point my eyes kind of glazed over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Anyway, the more plants and flowers they have as raw
materials, the wider the variety of items they can make.
We need to get our BLADEs focused on that, pronto![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0039
rows.name:
I guess they haven't had a lot of
good things to eat before now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0040
rows.name:
All of the Ma-non who come to
my restaurant seem moved nearly
to tears by our human food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0041
rows.name:
The strange thing is, they seem to like really strong
flavors—so they slather their pancakes with ketchup
and pour gobs of hot sauce on their burgers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0042
rows.name:
I'm afraid they're going to eat
through my entire condiment supply![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0043
rows.name:
But aside from that, they're good customers. Hmm...
Maybe I should start placing extra-large bottles
of condiments on the tables for Ma-non use?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0058
rows.name:
We've suffered a direct attack, and the pieces of the
Lifepoint are being destroyed one by one. Trust me,
there's no shortage of stressed-out folks around town.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0059
rows.name:
I have to ask: Do you think the
Central Life will be okay? They're
not going to destroy it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0060
rows.name:
If they manage to get that, all of the customers
who enjoy eating in my restaurant will keel over
and die, which is going to be just horrible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0061
rows.name: So hurry up and find that Core![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask about recent developments.

rows.label: tev023401_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask what Pollen intends to do next.

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0062
rows.name:
That kid fought hard for humanity until he
drew his last breath. I should live by his
example instead of moping over his death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0063
rows.name:
I need to make more of the hamburger
special he loved so I can serve
it up to exhausted BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0064
rows.name:
That's the way I can contribute to this fight.
So I'll work extra hard and use that watch
I was given as my special lucky charm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG0065
rows.name:
It's thanks to that watch that I'm able to
keep going. I'm so grateful to you and that
weird Ma-non fellow. Er, Chiopittas, was it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG1001
rows.name:
I hear we're finally going to
be able to return to our real
bodies. That's wonderful news![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG1002
rows.name:
When we do, we'll need food to
survive, which gives me and my
restaurant another chance to shine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG1003
rows.name:
I'll need to start preparing filling meals
to sate you hungry BLADEs, but also make
sure that they're nutritionally balanced.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023401_MSG1004
rows.name:
You can look forward to some exciting
new menu items in the near future![ST:wait ]
